chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 1263 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For orders on CMA 6502/2023 11-10-2023 Mr. Shakeel Ahmed Lakho, Advocate for petitioner. ***** Urgency is granted. Learned counsel for petitioner, under instructions, does not press this petition, which his accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
